variables.label: Population density
variables.description: Residents per km²; higher density scores as more pressure in the default UQI.

variables.label: Persons per dwelling
variables.description: Household crowding proxy from INSEE housing tables.

variables.label: Metro access
variables.description: Cumulative metro stations opened by decade (Wikidata/OSM), per 100k residents.

variables.label: Green space
variables.description: Public green m² per resident (Paris Open Data, 2022 snapshot applied where available).

variables.label: Median income
variables.description: Filosofi 2021 median disposable income (2022 panel year only).

sourceNotes.transit_access: Metro opening years from Wikidata/OSM; cumulative stations by decade.
